name: MoClo YTK
description: Single and multi-gene constructs for S. cerevisiae expression from plasmids or integrated into the genome

name: POMBOX
description: YTK-based Fission Yeast Cloning Toolkit for Molecular and Synthetic Biology

name: MoClo YSD
description: Extension to the MoClo YTK kit to optimize secretion and cell surface display of proteins of interest

name: Golden PiCS
description: Flexible modular system for advanced strain engineering in P. pastoris / K. phaffii

syntaxes.name: GoldenPiCS - Transcription Unit
syntaxes.description: To build a TU with a Promoter, CDS, and Terminator

syntaxes.name: GoldenPiCS - Multigene Constructs
syntaxes.description: To combine multiple TUs into a multigene construct

name: SubtiToolKit
description: Bioengineering kit for Bacillus subtilis and Gram-positive bacteria

syntaxes.name: SubtiToolKit - Level 0
syntaxes.description: To build a TU with a promoter, ribosome entry site, CDS, terminator, and destination vector

syntaxes.name: SubtiToolKit - Level 1
syntaxes.description: To Combine Level 0 TUs and / or Level 2 constructs into a multigene construct

name: Start-Stop Assembly
description: Functionally scarless, suitable for combinatorial assembly, and ideal for metabolic engineering in diverse organisms

syntaxes.name: Start-Stop Assembly - Level 1
syntaxes.description: To build a TU with a promoter, ribosome entry site, CDS, terminator, and destination vector

syntaxes.name: Start-Stop Assembly - Level 2
syntaxes.description: To combine several Level 1 constructs into a multigene construct

syntaxes.name: Start-Stop Assembly - Level 3
syntaxes.description: To combine several Level 2 constructs into a higher order construct

name: The Coli Toolkit (CTK)
description: An Extension of the Modular Yeast Toolkit for Use in E. coli

name: GoldenBraid
description: Iterative assembly method, popular in plant biology

syntaxes.name: GoldenBraid - Level 1 α
syntaxes.description: Clone a Transcriptional Unit into an α backbone using BsaI

syntaxes.name: GoldenBraid - Level 1 Ω
syntaxes.description: Clone a Transcriptional Unit into an Ω backbone using BtgZI and BsmBI

syntaxes.name: GoldenBraid - Level 2 - 2 α plasmids into Ω backbone
syntaxes.description: Combine 2 α plasmids into an Ω backbone using BsmBI

syntaxes.name: GoldenBraid - Level 2 - 2 Ω plasmids into α backbone
syntaxes.description: Combine 2 Ω plasmids into an α backbone using BsaI

name: MoClo (Marillonnet Lab)
description: Golden Gate Modular Cloning Toolbox for Plants

syntaxes.name: MoClo - Level 2
syntaxes.description: Clone one or several Transcriptional Units and an End Linker into a Backbone
